parameters.content:
## Appointments – Update Status

**POST** `/webhook/appointments/update_status`

Updates `appointments.status` and inserts an audit row in
`appointment_status_log`. No transition gating — the user is free
to move the appointment to any status. No side-effects (no Google
Calendar / no notifications).

**Allowed status values:**
- pending, scheduled, confirmed, arrived, in_progress,
  completed, no_show, cancelled

**No transition restrictions** — any source status can move to any
target status. The only no-op is staying in the same status.

**When status='cancelled', cancellation_reason is required:**
- late, in_time, no_notice, by_doctor, by_clinic, other
- 'reschedule' is BLOCKED here (only set by /appointments/reschedule)
- If reason='other', cancellation_note is required.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "appointment_id": "abc-123",
  "status": "cancelled",
  "cancellation_reason": "by_doctor",  // required if status='cancelled'
  "cancellation_note": "…",            // required if reason='other'
  "changed_by": "user-id",              // optional
  "note": "Notas extra para el log"     // optional, distinto del cancellation_note
}
```

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "code": 200,
  "appointment_id": "abc-123",
  "from_status": "scheduled",
  "status": "cancelled",
  "cancellation_reason": "by_doctor"
}
```

**Response 409 (no-op):**
```json
{ "error": true, "code": 409, "message": "Appointment is already in status \"cancelled\"" }
```

**Response 400 (validation error):**
```json
{ "error": true, "code": 400, "message": "cancellation_reason is required when status='cancelled'" }
```

parameters.query: SELECT id::text AS id, status FROM appointments WHERE id::text = '{{ $json.appointment_id }}' LIMIT 1;

-- Atomic update + audit insert. Cancellation_reason/note travel together.
WITH updated AS (
  UPDATE appointments
  SET status              = '{{ $json.to_status }}',
      cancellation_reason = NULLIF('{{ $json.cancellation_reason }}', 'null'),
      cancellation_note   = NULLIF('{{ $json.cancellation_note }}', 'null'),
      updated_at          = NOW()
  WHERE id::text = '{{ $json.appointment_id }}'
  RETURNING id::text AS id, status, cancellation_reason
)
INSERT INTO appointment_status_log (appointment_id, from_status, to_status, cancellation_reason, cancellation_note, changed_by, note)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.appointment_id }}',
  '{{ $json.from_status }}',
  '{{ $json.to_status }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cancellation_reason }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cancellation_note }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.changed_by }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.note }}', 'null')
FROM updated
RETURNING appointment_id, from_status, to_status, cancellation_reason, changed_at::text AS changed_at;
